base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_icons — a ui from 1989 populous. Miracle-icons + UI — raise/lower terrain, Papal Magnet placement, earthquake/flood/volcano/Armageddon divine powers + mana meter. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Miracle-icons + UI — raise/lower terrain, Papal Magnet placement, earthquake/flood/volcano/Armageddon divine powers + mana meter
